about.title: Quality is not an accident
about.name: Jorge Carreño Ortiz
about.role: QA Tester → QA Automation Engineer | Barcelona · Amaris Consulting
about.description: Experienced QA Tester leading the Manual-to-Automation transition on his team. PlayQAcademy is the campus he wishes he'd had when he started this transition — and he's building it while living through it.
about.portfolio: Previously created MyCampusISTQB, a complete campus for the ISTQB Foundation certification, where he proved that quality technical pedagogy changes careers. PlayQAcademy is the next evolution of that mission.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.metaDescription: PlayQAcademy Privacy Policy. Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data in compliance with the GDPR.
privacy.s1Body: At PlayQAcademy, accessible from https://playq.academy, the privacy of our users is a top priority. This Privacy Policy describes what personal information we collect, how we use it, with whom we share it, and what rights you have regarding your data. By using our platform, you agree to the practices described in this policy.
privacy.s2Body: The data controller responsible for your personal data is SidMaier, creator and owner of PlayQAcademy, based in Barcelona, Spain. You may contact the data controller at any time via email: sidmaierlabs@gmail.com.
privacy.s3Body: PlayQAcademy collects only the data strictly necessary to provide the online learning service. We do not collect payment information, we do not display advertising, and we do not sell data to third parties.
privacy.s3Body2: The data we collect falls into the following categories:
s3List: Account information: email address, display name, and profile photo (optional). This data is obtained when you register via email or via Google authentication through Firebase Authentication.
Academic progress data: completed lessons, finished modules, lesson bookmarks, and exam scores. This data enables the platform to display your progress and sequentially unlock content.

Gamification data: total points, level, activity streak, earned badges, IDs of correctly answered quizzes, and completed exercises. This data powers the achievement system, levels, and student leaderboard.
Exam activity data: submitted answers, earned scores, time spent, and exam status (passed/failed).
privacy.s4Body: We use your personal data exclusively for the following purposes:
s4List: Service provision: creating and maintaining your account, authenticating your identity, and granting access to lessons, exercises, and exams on the platform.
Progress tracking: recording your academic progress to display content appropriate for your level and to enable sequential module navigation.
Gamification system: calculating scores, levels, and badges to motivate learning and to display your position on the student leaderboard.
Platform improvement: analyzing platform usage in an aggregated and anonymous manner to identify areas for improvement in content and user experience.
Essential communications: sending emails related to your account operation, such as password reset (exclusively at your request). We do not send promotional emails or newsletters.
privacy.s5Body: The processing of your personal data is based on the following legal grounds under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679):
s5List: Consent (Art. 6.1.a): by registering on PlayQAcademy, you explicitly consent to the processing of your data for the purposes described in this policy. You may withdraw your consent at any time by requesting account deletion.
Contract performance (Art. 6.1.b): the processing is necessary to provide you with the educational platform service you have requested when creating your account.

Legitimate interest (Art. 6.1.f): the aggregated and anonymous analysis of platform usage to improve content and the learning experience is based on our legitimate interest as an educational service provider.
privacy.s6Body: To provide you with the service, we rely on the following technology providers acting as data processors: Firebase (Google LLC) provides the user authentication infrastructure (Firebase Authentication) and the cloud database (Firestore) where your account, progress, and gamification data are stored. Data is stored in Google data centers located within the European Economic Area. Vercel Inc. provides web hosting for the platform. Vercel transiently processes your IP address and browsing data to serve the pages. None of these providers use your data for their own purposes. We do not share, sell, or rent your personal data to third parties under any circumstances.
privacy.s7Body: We retain your personal data for as long as you maintain an active account on PlayQAcademy. If you request account deletion, we will delete all your personal data within a maximum of 30 calendar days from the receipt of your request, unless there is a legal obligation requiring longer retention. Aggregated and anonymized usage data (which does not identify you) may be retained indefinitely for statistical and service improvement purposes.
privacy.s8Body: As a user located in the European Union, the GDPR grants you the following rights over your personal data:
s8List: Right of access: you may request a copy of all personal data we hold about you.
Right of rectification: you may request the correction of inaccurate or incomplete data.
Right of erasure (right to be forgotten): you may request the complete deletion of your personal data. This entails the irreversible deletion of your account and all your progress.
Right to restriction of processing: you may request that we restrict the processing of your data under certain circumstances.
Right to data portability: you may request a copy of your data in a structured, commonly used, and machine-readable format to transfer it to another controller.
Right to object: you may object to processing based on legitimate interests, as well as withdraw your consent at any time.
Right to lodge a complaint: if you consider that the processing of your data infringes the GDPR, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (AEPD) at www.aepd.es.
privacy.s9Body: We implement technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. Authentication is managed through Firebase Authentication, which uses industry-standard protocols (OAuth 2.0, HTTPS). Data in Firestore is protected by security rules that ensure each user can only read and modify their own data. Communication between your browser and our servers is carried out via HTTPS with TLS encryption.
privacy.s10Body: PlayQAcademy is not directed at individuals under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children under 16. If you are a parent or guardian and become aware that a child under your care has provided us with personal data without your consent, please contact us at sidmaierlabs@gmail.com for its immediate deletion.
privacy.s11Body: We reserve the right to update this Privacy Policy at any time to reflect changes in our data processing practices or due to legal requirements. The date of the last update will be displayed at the top of this page. We recommend that you review this policy periodically. Continued use of the platform after the publication of changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.
privacy.s12Body: For any questions, inquiries, or exercise of your rights in relation to this Privacy Policy, you may contact the data controller at the following email address: sidmaierlabs@gmail.com. We will respond to your request within a maximum of 30 calendar days, as established by the GDPR.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.metaDescription: PlayQAcademy Terms of Service. Conditions of use for the QA learning platform: QA Fundamentals, ISTQB CTFL certification, and Playwright/TypeScript automation.
terms.s1Body: By accessing or using PlayQAcademy (hereinafter, the Platform), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you must not use the Platform. These terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you (the User) and SidMaier (the Owner), creator and proprietor of PlayQAcademy.
terms.s2Body: PlayQAcademy is an online educational platform that offers free software quality assurance (QA) training content, organized into three campuses: QA Fundamentals (manual testing, SDLC, agile methodologies), ISTQB CTFL Foundation Level certification preparation, and test automation with Playwright and TypeScript. The Platform includes: interactive lessons with practical exercises, a gamification system with points, badges, and leaderboard, certification exams and mock exams, a testing terminology glossary, and an interactive playground for practicing tests. Access to all educational content is completely free, and no credit card or payment of any kind is required.
terms.s3Body: To create an account on PlayQAcademy, you must be at least 16 years of age. By registering, you represent that you meet this age requirement. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts of users who do not meet this requirement.
terms.s4Body: By creating an account on PlayQAcademy, you agree to the following responsibilities:
s4List: Provide truthful, accurate, and complete information during the registration process.
Maintain the confidentiality of your login credentials (email and password). You are responsible for all activity that occurs under your account.
Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other security breach.
Not share your account or allow third parties to access the Platform using your credentials.
Accept that the Owner will not be liable for any loss or damage arising from failure to comply with these security obligations.
terms.s5Body: When using PlayQAcademy, you agree not to engage in the following prohibited activities:
s5List: Using the Platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
Attempting to access restricted areas of the Platform, servers, or other users' accounts without authorization.
Interfering with or disrupting the operation of the Platform, its servers, or connected networks.
Reverse-engineering, decompiling, or extracting the source code of the Platform or its content.
Using bots, scrapers, or other automated means to access or extract data from the Platform.
Posting, uploading, or transmitting content that is illegal, offensive, defamatory, obscene, or infringes upon third-party rights.
Impersonating another person or entity, or misrepresenting your affiliation with a person or entity.
Using the Platform to send unsolicited communications (spam) or for unauthorized commercial purposes.
terms.s6Body: All content available on PlayQAcademy — including but not limited to texts, lessons, exercises, quizzes, images, graphics, logos, sample code, curriculum structure, and interface design — is the exclusive intellectual property of SidMaier and is protected by the intellectual property laws of Spain and applicable international treaties. You are granted a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, and revocable license to access and use the Platform's content exclusively for your personal learning. It is not permitted to: reproduce, distribute, modify, create derivative works, publicly display, transmit, or commercially exploit any content from the Platform without prior written authorization from the Owner.
terms.s7Body: Currently, PlayQAcademy does not allow users to publish or upload their own content beyond profile information (display name and profile photo). Any information you provide in your profile must be appropriate and must not infringe upon third-party rights. We reserve the right to remove any profile content we deem inappropriate.
terms.s8Body: The Platform is provided as is and as available, without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. The Owner does not guarantee that the Platform will be free of errors, interruptions, or security vulnerabilities. The educational content is provided for training purposes and does not constitute professional advice. PlayQAcademy's exams and mock exams (including the "ISTQB CTFL" mock exams) are internal platform recognitions and practice material; they do not constitute official certifications recognized by external entities. In particular, PlayQAcademy is not affiliated with, accredited by, or endorsed by ISTQB® (International Software Testing Qualifications Board) or any national member board; passing an internal mock exam does not equal or replace the official ISTQB CTFL certification, which can only be obtained through an ISTQB-accredited exam provider.
terms.s9Body: To the maximum extent permitted by applicable law, SidMaier shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages resulting from: (a) the use or inability to use the Platform, (b) the loss of progress or gamification data due to technical failures, provided they are not a consequence of gross negligence or willful misconduct on the part of the Owner, (c) the conduct of third parties on the Platform, and (d) the content of external websites linked from the Platform. This limitation of liability applies regardless of the legal theory on which the claim is based. Given that PlayQAcademy is a free service, the Owner's total liability, if judicially determined, shall be limited to the amount of 100 euros.
terms.s10Body: We reserve the right to suspend or cancel your account and your access to the Platform at any time, with or without prior notice, if we deem that you have violated these Terms of Service or engaged in fraudulent or harmful conduct toward the Platform or its users. You may cancel your account at any time from the Platform settings. In such case, all your personal data will be deleted in accordance with our Privacy Policy.
terms.s11Body: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain. Any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or relating to these terms shall be submitted to the courts and tribunals of Barcelona, Spain, with the parties expressly waiving any other jurisdiction that may correspond to them. However, as a consumer, you may also bring proceedings before the courts of your domicile if applicable law so permits.
terms.s12Body: We reserve the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will become effective at the time of their publication on this page. The date of the last update will be displayed at the top of this page. It is your responsibility to periodically review these terms. Continued use of the Platform after the publication of changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
terms.s13Body: For any questions, inquiries, or communications related to these Terms of Service, you may contact the Owner at the following email address: sidmaierlabs@gmail.com.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.metaDescription: PlayQAcademy Cookie Policy. Learn what cookies we use and how to manage them in your browser.
cookies.s1Body: Cookies are small text files that websites store on your device (computer, tablet, or mobile phone) when you visit them. Cookies are widely used to make websites work properly, to remember user preferences, and to provide information to site owners. Cookies can be session cookies (deleted when you close the browser) or persistent cookies (they remain on your device for a set period).
cookies.s2Body: At PlayQAcademy, we exclusively use strictly necessary technical cookies required for the platform to function. We do not use advertising cookies, tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party cookies for commercial purposes. Our use of cookies is minimal and transparent.
cookies.s3Body: The following cookies are essential for the operation of PlayQAcademy and cannot be disabled in our systems:
s3List: Firebase Authentication session cookie (__session / auth_token): managed by Firebase Auth to keep you signed in while you browse the platform. It is a session cookie that is deleted upon signing out. Without this cookie, you would not be able to access protected areas (dashboard, lessons, exams).

Language preference cookie (i18next): stores your preferred language (es or en) so that the platform displays content in the correct language on each visit. It is a persistent cookie with a duration of one year. Without this cookie, the platform would use automatic language detection on each visit.
cookies.s4Body: For your peace of mind, we explicitly inform you that PlayQAcademy does NOT use: behavioral advertising cookies, cross-site tracking cookies, third-party analytics cookies (such as Google Analytics), social media cookies, tracking pixels, or fingerprinting technologies. We do not collect browsing data for advertising purposes nor share information with ad networks. There is no advertising on the platform.
cookies.s5Body: You can configure your browser to reject all cookies or to notify you when a cookie is sent. However, please note that if you disable session cookies, the protected areas of the platform will not function correctly (you will not be able to sign in or access lessons). Each browser has a different procedure for managing cookies:
s5List: Google Chrome: Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data.
Mozilla Firefox: Options → Privacy & Security → Cookies and Site Data.
Microsoft Edge: Settings → Cookies and site permissions → Cookies and site data.
Safari (macOS): Preferences → Privacy → Cookies and website data.
Safari (iOS): Settings → Safari → Advanced → Block All Cookies.
cookies.s6Body: For any questions or inquiries related to our Cookie Policy, you may contact us at the following email address: sidmaierlabs@gmail.com. We will respond to your inquiry as soon as possible.
